prompt: A candid street photograph of a young woman standing just inside the arched stone gateway of a Shanghai shikumen longtang entrance, authentic daily life photography, natural candid moment. Full-body framing, centered composition, shot from within the lane looking outward — she stands beneath the ornate carved stone arch, morning summer light filtering in from behind. East Asian young woman in her early 20s. Almond-shaped eyes with natural double eyelids, slightly elongated eye corners. Straight refined nose with a delicate bridge. Skin tone fair to light beige (NC10–NC20) — skin subsurface scattering visible under soft morning directional light, specular micro-highlights on cheekbones and nose ridge, fine foundation powder grain perceptible. Dewy summer skin, light BB coverage, peachy tinted lip gloss. She wears a butter yellow linen co-ord — a cropped wide-collar top and matching high-waist wide-leg trousers, white leather slides. A woven micro bag in natural straw hangs from her forearm. Small pearl drop earrings catch the morning light. She stands with her weight shifted to one hip, fingers of one hand loosely hooked on the bag strap, gaze drifting slightly upward toward the arch above — a casual self-possession that reads as entirely natural yet somehow composed, the particular ease of a Shanghai girl who grew up moving effortlessly between old lanes and glossy shopping malls without ever noticing the gap. The stone arch rises around her, its carved brick relief worn but legible — the longtang name tile faintly visible above the keystone. Lane walls of old lime-washed brick recede behind her. At the lane's far vanishing point, above the old tile roofline, the upper floors of a distant Pudong tower dissolve in summer morning haze — a soft ghost of modern Shanghai hovering above the old stones, barely there. Two or three stray hairs displaced by morning lane air, natural unplanned imperfection, not geometrically symmetrical. Soft directional morning light from outside the arch, cool-to-warm transition, long gentle shadows thrown by the arch onto the lane pavement beneath her feet. Gentle and warm, quiet contentment, a private sense of belonging. Subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, photographic noise texture not CG render smoothness. Aspect ratio 2:3. No watermark, no text overlay, not cartoon, not digitally painted, not illustration, not anime.
